initiatives.name: Las Vegas Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Supporting community-led mutual aid initiatives throughout the Las Vegas Valley and surrounding areas.

initiatives.name: Red Desert Collective
initiatives.description: Local mutual aid and community organizing collective.

initiatives.name: True Beginnings
initiatives.description: Providing transitional housing and comprehensive support services for formerly incarcerated women through mutual aid, mentorship, and community building to ensure successful reintegration.

initiatives.name: Nevada Desert Experience
initiatives.description: Faith-based organization working for peace and nuclear abolition through direct action and community organizing.

initiatives.name: Las Vegas Zine Library
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and cultural resistance through DIY publishing and radical literature in Las Vegas. They coordinate zine distribution, workshops, and solidarity networks while building power through alternative media, community archiving, and creating spaces for independent voices and creative expression.

initiatives.name: The Center
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through LGBTQ+ advocacy and services in Southern Nevada. They coordinate support groups, health resources, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing, cultural programming, and creating spaces for queer and trans people to thrive.

initiatives.name: SURJ Vegas
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Las Vegas. They coordinate community organizing, mobilizing, and education initiatives while building power through political education, direct action support, and creating spaces for accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Love and Fury Infoshop
initiatives.description: Las Vegas based anarchist collective and distro. Infoshop, community space, and resource center coming soon
